stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows an extract of an ATC flight plan as presented in a briefing pack for a flight. Of the ITEM 18 text codes, which of the following options is a correct decode of any of the red items?

options.a: The registration of the aircraft is D-EASA.
options.b: The flight plan selector code is AB-CD.
options.c: The date of the flight is 17/04/2009.
options.d: The operator's certification region is EASA.
